rationale: Law firm investigating Kering/Gucci for allegedly keeping unrefunded tariff-driven price hikes is a headline-level price/trust controversy.
Factual corporate licensing/deal reporting (Coty-Kering transaction) with no evaluative brand sentiment toward Gucci.

Plain factual match-result reporting; Gucci mentioned incidentally via ambassador's outfit, no evaluative brand verdict.
